title: DisableDimensions
description: Plugin to disable or enable any dimension, from vanilla,mods and data-packs
body:
**This plugin can disable or enable any dimension, from vanilla, mods and data packs.**

**How to use:**

Commands:
- /dimensions list (dimensions list)
- /dimensions messages <yes/no> show or hide message then dimension block
- /dimensions messages add/list <dimension> <message>
- /dimensions toggle <dimension> just press enter and dimensions will be enable or disable
- /dimensions trigger add/list/remove <dimension> block/entity use to add trigger to dimension unluck 
- /dimensions events on/off to control triggers 
-  **not need reload server!**

Example:
- /dimensions list
  
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee07d814e5ddfd912a82e8c95a3a46d11d134dcd.png)
- /dimensions toggle minecraft:server_projectile_test_level ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1abfdccd41ab2cfbcb8da0fd19a9efe7d4cbf1c.png)
- /dimensions toggle minecraft:server_projectile_test_level ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283a5ba35d2afe1b4fa4a39c4e18332c4709a21a.png)
